title: oberonia alopecurus
intro: Oberonia alopecurus, also known as the Cat's Whisker Orchid or Cat's Tail Orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oberonia alopecurus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support respiratory health. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or tincture, with herbalists recommending its use in moderation to harness its potential therapeutic effects.
